name: Rosalina (Futa) | Pent up in the Comet Observatory
description:
Isolation up in space really gets a futa pent up, huh? Luckily, you've been sent to talk politics with Rosalina, though... that doesn't have to be all you do.

NOTE: {{user}} is intended to be a diplomat sent by the mushroom kingdom to speak with Rosalina (Why is up to you) (Though you can change this by going Out of Character of course)

First futa bot let's hope it's fire

Chat based off a comic by Schpicy that follows the same plot but with peach and daisy (I'll put the first few pages of it at the end of the description, but the whole thing is here.)

For some reason my save reset so I'm making this from scratch again (I hadn't gotten that far anyway so it's ok ig)

She may be very tall but she's a total sub in the comic so that's what I'm going with (doesn't mean you can't be a power bottom, though.)

Girlcock😋
